chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4357 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge PRIORITY. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.17854/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 08.09.2021. Ms. Maria Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Khaleeque Ahmed, DAG. ----- Mr. Waseem Mumtaz Malik, Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.3, which taken on record. Chaudhry Sultan Mehmood, Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.2 as well as Report on behalf of the Respondent No.2, which are also taken on record, copies whereof have been supplied to Counsel for the Petitioner. For the sake of brevity the contents of the said Report filed on behalf of the Respondent No.2 are reproduced herein below:- “Through the above cited Petition, the procurement process for IDEAS 2024 was impugned. The competent authority has cancelled the procurement process and in this regard a public notice has been issued. Copy of the same is attached as Annexure-A.” Learned counsel for the Respondent No.2 further clarifies that fresh tender process will be initiated and the Petitioner in which all the participants will be provided a fair opportunity to participate, in the event the procurement is to be reinitiated. In the wake of the aforesaid statement, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the instant Petition may be disposed of in such terms. Order accordingly. The Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUBASHIR
